title: Module 1
content:
Planar Mechanisms: Terminology and definitions. Kinematic pairs,
kinematic chains, and degrees of freedom of mechanisms. Kinematic
Inversion of 4-bar and slider-crank chains.
Velocity Analysis: Relative motion -relative velocity.
Acceleration Analysis- Relative acceleration – Concept of Coriolis
acceleration (No numericals & derivation)

title: Module 2
content:
Governors: Terminology and classification; Watt, Porter, Proell,
Hartnell, Hartung, quality of governors, inertia governors- governor
speed control
Cams and Followers: Classification of cams and followers.
Displacement diagrams. Velocity and acceleration analysis of SHM,
uniform velocity, uniform acceleration, and cycloidal motion, Cam
profiles with and without offset.

title: Module 3
content:
Gears and Gear Trains: Classification of gears. Terminology and
definitions of spur gears. Law of gearing, length of path of contact, arc
of contact, and contact ratio. Interference and minimum number of teeth
to avoid interference. Simple and compound gear trains. Planetary gear
trains, differential, Gear ratio of planetary gear trains.
Flywheels: Turning moment diagrams. Fluctuation of energy.
Flywheel, size of flywheel (No numerical problems).

title: Module 4
content:
Balancing of Rotating Masses: Static and dynamic balancing.
Balancing of masses rotating in several planes.
Balancing of Reciprocating Masses: Balancing of reciprocating
masses.
Gyroscope: Principle-Angular Acceleration-Effect of gyroscopic
couple airplanes, and ships, stability of automobile and two-wheel
vehicles.
